---
title: "08 | Stand"
author: "C.O."
date: "August 2026"
draft: true
---

When we stand, it requires us to remain faithfully in one position. This position should be seeking the LORD for which direction we should go. May our prayer be that the HOLY SPIRIT will help us to stand in our position as we seek HIS face.

Meditate on these verses to gain wisdom:

-   Week 1
    -   Proverbs 22:29
-   Week 2
    -   1 Corinthians 16:13
-   Week 3
    -   Romans 11:20
-   Week 4
    -   1 Kings 10:8
